name: Breakfast Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 cup dried fruit packed and chopped
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Spray a 9x13 inch pan with Pam. Mix all ingredients, pat thinly on the bottom of the pan, sprinkle with extra cinnamon and bake for 30 minutes. Allow to cool before removing or they will crumble. For a fat substitute, use 1/2 cup of frozen cranberries thawed in a little water with a bit of sugar, mashed bananas, mashed berries, or puree a few pears in some sauce. Be creative!
